---
title: "Schedule"
---

::: {.schedule-grid}
| Week | Mon | Tue | Thu | Fri |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **W1** | 4/20 [Day 1](class/class-1.html):<br>Mastery Learning - Specifications Grading | 4/21 [Day 2](class/class-2.html):<br>Activity - Reading Definitions and Classifying Functions | 4/23 [Day 3](class/class-3.html):<br>Plotting in R | 4/24 [Day 4](class/class-4.html):<br>Interactive Programming Activity |
| **W2** | 4/27 [Day 5](class/class-5.html):<br>Project Work (Cohesive Analysis) | 4/28 [Day 6](class/class-6.html):<br>Practice with Functions | 4/30 [Day 7](class/class-7.html):<br>Describing Functions (practice Reading Mathematics) | 5/1 [Day 8](class/class-8.html):<br>Compare your Project 1 Task 2 |
| **W3** | 5/4 [Day 9](class/class-9.html):<br>Activity - Practice with Logarithms | 5/5 [Day 10](class/class-10.html):<br>Activity - Solving Equations | 5/7 [Day 11](class/class-11.html):<br>Example Project | 5/8 [Day 12](class/class-12.html):<br>See the Pieces |
| **W4** | 5/11 [Day 13](class/class-13.html):<br>Exploring new functions | 5/12 [Day 14](class/class-14.html):<br>Probability Exercise (Tropical Storms Example from Prep) | 5/14 [Day 15](class/class-15.html):<br>Likelihood | 5/15 [Day 16](class/class-16.html):<br>Writing the Linearization |
| **W5** | 5/18 [Day 17](class/class-17.html):<br>Class Discussion - The derivative is a function applet | 5/19 [Day 18](class/class-18.html):<br>Activity - Computing Derivatives Practice | 5/21 [Day 19](class/class-19.html):<br>Activity - Compute derivatives | 5/22 [Day 20](class/class-20.html):<br>Activity - Chain Rule |
| **W6** | 🚫 Memorial Day | 5/26 [Day 21](class/class-21.html):<br>Activity - Derivative Practice with Parameters | 5/28 [Day 22](class/class-22.html):<br>Activity - Chain Rule Practice | 5/29 [Day 23](class/class-23.html):<br>Activity - Partial Derivatives With the Chain Rule |
| **W7** | 6/1 [Day 24](class/class-24.html):<br>Activity - Loglikelihood Practice, Derivatives, Optimization, and Project 2 | 6/2 [Day 25](class/class-25.html):<br>Activity - Comparing Solutions | 6/4 [Day 26](class/class-26.html):<br>Find any extrema of $g(x) = x(1-x)$. | 6/5 [Day 27](class/class-27.html):<br>Activity - Practice with Optimization |
| **W8** | 6/8 [Day 28](class/class-28.html):<br>Summary: Steps to obtain loglikelihood. | 6/9 [Day 29](class/class-29.html):<br>Activity - Maximum likelihood Method for $f_6$ | 6/11 [Day 30](class/class-30.html):<br>Activity - More Practice with Maximum Likelihood Method | 6/12 [Day 31](class/class-31.html):<br>Activity - Least Squares Regression: Another method for fitting a model to data |
| **W9** | 6/15 [Day 32](class/class-32.html):<br>Activity - Compare loglikelihood and least squares | 6/16 [Day 33](class/class-33.html):<br>Activity - Balls in a Bag | 6/18 [Day 34](class/class-34.html):<br>Activity - Targets for Continuous Random Variables | 🚫 Juneteenth |
| **W10** | 6/22 [Day 35](class/class-35.html):<br>Activity - Calculating Expected Value using Rectangular Approximations | 6/23 [Day 36](class/class-36.html):<br>Example 1 | 6/25 [Day 37](class/class-37.html):<br>Riemann Sums with R, Definite integrals with Mathematica | 6/26 [Day 38](class/class-38.html):<br>"Infinite targets" and Rectangles - An Exponential Random Variable |
| **W11** | 6/29 [Day 39](class/class-39.html):<br>Activity - Practice with PDFs, CDFs, Expected Value, Variance, and Probabilities | 6/30 [Day 40](class/class-40.html):<br>Solving a System of Equations | 7/2 [Day 41](class/class-41.html):<br>Continuation from last time - More Practice with finding PDFs, Expected Value, Variance, and CDF | 🚫 Independence Day |
| **W12** | 7/6 [Day 42](class/class-42.html):<br>Calculate a Percentile | 7/7 [Day 43](class/class-43.html):<br>Definite Integrals and Geometric arguments | 7/9 [Day 44](class/class-44.html):<br>Making Connections using CDFs and PDFs | 7/10 [Day 45](class/class-45.html):<br>Teach One Another |
| **W13** | 7/13 [Day 46](class/class-46.html):<br>Change of Variables | 7/14 [Flex 1](flex/flex-1.html) | 7/16 [Flex 2](flex/flex-2.html) | 7/17 [Flex 3](flex/flex-3.html) |
| **W14** | 7/20 Project Work Day | 7/21 Project Work Day | — | — |
:::
